drills.title: Factory & Sports + Sound & Maths Vocabulary — Speaking Set 1

sentences.english: The factory's assembly line runs fast.
sentences.hindi: फैक्ट्री की असेंबली लाइन तेज़ चलती है।
sentences.pronunciation: the factory's assembly line runs fast

sentences.english: Cricket is the most popular sport in India.
sentences.hindi: क्रिकेट भारत में सबसे लोकप्रिय खेल है।
sentences.pronunciation: cricket is the most popular sport in india

sentences.english: The football team won the match.
sentences.pronunciation: the football team won the match

drills.title: Factory & Sports + Sound & Maths Vocabulary — Speaking Set 2

sentences.english: Hockey is our national game.
sentences.pronunciation: hockey is our national game

sentences.english: I like playing badminton.
sentences.pronunciation: i like playing badminton

sentences.english: He got first place in the race.
sentences.hindi: उसने दौड़ में पहला स्थान पाया।
sentences.pronunciation: he got first place in the race

drills.title: Factory & Sports + Sound & Maths Vocabulary — Speaking Set 3

sentences.english: The players are running on the field.
sentences.hindi: खिलाड़ी मैदान में दौड़ रहे हैं।
sentences.pronunciation: the players are running on the field

sentences.english: The team performed well.
sentences.pronunciation: the team performed well

sentences.english: The match is tomorrow evening.
sentences.pronunciation: the match is tomorrow evening

drills.title: Factory & Sports + Sound & Maths Vocabulary — Speaking Set 4

sentences.english: The ball went out of the boundary.
sentences.hindi: गेंद सीमा के बाहर चली गई।
sentences.pronunciation: the ball went out of the boundary

sentences.english: He scored a goal and won the match.
sentences.pronunciation: he scored a goal and won the match

sentences.english: This sound is very loud.
sentences.pronunciation: this sound is very loud

drills.title: Factory & Sports + Sound & Maths Vocabulary — Speaking Set 5

sentences.english: His voice is very soft.
sentences.pronunciation: his voice is very soft

sentences.english: There is a lot of noise in the factory.
sentences.hindi: फैक्ट्री में बहुत शोर होता है।
sentences.pronunciation: there is a lot of noise in the factory

sentences.english: There was complete silence at night.
sentences.pronunciation: there was complete silence at night

drills.title: Factory & Sports + Sound & Maths Vocabulary — Speaking Set 6

sentences.english: An echo was heard in the mountains.
sentences.pronunciation: an echo was heard in the mountains

sentences.english: I like listening to music.
sentences.pronunciation: i like listening to music

sentences.english: Multiplying three by five gives fifteen.
sentences.hindi: तीन को पाँच से गुणा करने पर पंद्रह होता है।
sentences.pronunciation: multiplying three by five gives fifteen

drills.title: Factory & Sports + Sound & Maths Vocabulary — Speaking Set 7

sentences.english: Dividing twenty by five gives four.
sentences.hindi: बीस को पाँच से भाग देने पर चार होता है।
sentences.pronunciation: dividing twenty by five gives four

sentences.english: The total number is one hundred.
sentences.pronunciation: the total number is one hundred
